steps.title: Rewrite the radical as an exponent
Equate exponents
steps.content: Since both sides have base $4$, set the exponents equal: $$8c=\frac{7}{3}.$$

steps.title: Solve for $c$
steps.content: Divide by $8$: $$c=\frac{7}{3}\cdot\frac{1}{8}=\frac{7}{24}\approx 0.2916.$$ The stored answer is .2916. The exact fraction and this decimal represent the same value.
